climate.title: The Arctic Ocean May Have Passed a Crucial Tipping Point That Could Harm Food Webs and Worsen Climate Change
climate.description: Sea ice loss seems to have triggered a decline in the nutrient nitrate, affecting the tiny organisms that form the foundations of marine food chains and absorb atmospheric carbon dioxide, according to a new study

climate.title: ‘Deteriorating health’: Kerala HC grants interim bail to convict sentenced to death in Renjith Sreenivasan murder case
climate.description: Kerala HC grants 30-day interim bail to death row convict Navas in Renjith Sreenivasan murder case, citing deteriorating health and quadriparesis.
